description: This is a test class for the SystemController in a Spring Boot application, validating health and info endpoints via MockMvc.

classes.name: test_system_controller_webmvc_test
classes.description: A JUnit test class for testing SystemController endpoints using MockMvc. It verifies that endpoints like /, /health, and /api/info are accessible and return expected responses.

methods.name: getRoot_isPublic
methods.description: Tests that GET / returns a welcome message and is publicly accessible.

methods.name: getHealth_isPublic
methods.description: Tests that GET /health returns 'OK' and is publicly accessible.

methods.name: getInfo_isPublic
methods.description: Tests that GET /api/info returns application info and is publicly accessible.
